spec_match.rationale: Fascinating mock simulation. Accurately maps how quota/requested attributes from QuotaExceededError are consumed to generate user-facing recovery dialogues.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Offers sliders to model usage boundaries, mock write triggers, and full modal flows with dynamic recovery.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Completely aligns with the user pay-off narrative described in the index.

edge_cases.rationale: Excellently catches the overflow thresholds and clamps values safely.

references.rationale: Includes correct specifications and ChromeStatus entry reference links.

design_system.rationale: Adheres nicely to layout borders, margins, and spacing.

summary: A brilliant interactive simulation of storage pressure dialogs. By mimicking the new QuotaExceededError object attributes, the page creates a highly educational playground illustrating how developers can resolve quota constraints gracefully.
